headline: The Unpopular Move That Telegraphed the Elevance Health Stock Surge
summary: While Wall Street fixated on a gloomy forecast, the company was making a painful but telling choice that hinted at the turnaround to come.

headline: UnitedHealth (UNH) Stock Looks Reasonable Even After A 42% Gain
summary: UnitedHealth Group has delivered a 41.5% return over the past year, yet its valuation checks paint a more mixed picture, leaving investors weighing a strong share price run against what the broader metrics suggest about value. A 41.5% one-year return signals that expectations around UnitedHealth Group have already moved up meaningfully. Regulatory developments around pharmacy benefit management and expanded coverage decisions, such as new screening benefits, can support the long term...

headline: Members of Congress Are Loading Up on Johnson & Johnson and UnitedHealth. Here's Why Retail Investors Should Pay Attention.
summary: Politicians serve on committees that set healthcare policy, monitor government contracts, and shape regulatory frameworks.
